SpaceSystem.name: DemoSat
SpaceSystem.shortDescription: DemoSat comprehensive XTCE v1.2 test database

NoteSet.Note: Comprehensive XTCE database for xtce-editor test coverage.
Covers all ParameterType variants, calibrators, units, aliases, type inheritance, and signed encodings.
Packet structures follow CCSDS Space Packet Protocol with the standard bit-packed 6-byte primary header (3+1+1+11+2+14+16 bits).

BooleanParameterType.name: ENABLE
BooleanParameterType.LongDescription: Byte-aligned boolean for parameters that must fall on byte boundaries. Uses 8-bit encoding so it is byte-aligned in packed containers.

Enumeration.label: ECLIPSE
Enumeration.shortDescription: In Earth shadow, solar charging suspended

EnumeratedParameterType.name: ResetCauseType
EnumeratedParameterType.shortDescription: Most recent OBC reset cause (5 causes)

IntegerParameterType.name: TemperatureType
IntegerParameterType.LongDescription: 16-bit unsigned ADC reading from an onboard NTC thermistor. A first-order polynomial calibrator converts raw counts to degrees Celsius: T(°C) = -40.0 + 0.02 * raw_counts Valid engineering range: -40 °C (raw=0) to +91 °C (raw=6550).

IntegerParameterType.name: BattThermType
IntegerParameterType.LongDescription: Battery pack thermistor with non-linear NTC characteristic. Calibrated using a cubic spline through 6 characterised measurement points. The spline is not extrapolated outside the measured range.

IntegerParameterType.name: CurrentType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: Bus current sensor in mA (signed 16-bit two's complement)
IntegerParameterType.LongDescription: Signed 16-bit current measurement. Positive values indicate net charging current into the battery; negative values indicate net load current drawn from the battery. Range: -32768 to +32767 mA.

FloatParameterType.name: AngularRateType
FloatParameterType.shortDescription: Angular rate measurement in degrees per second

IntegerParameterType.name: dBmType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: RF power level in dBm (signed 8-bit, range -128 to +127)

RelativeTimeParameterType.name: METType
RelativeTimeParameterType.shortDescription: Mission elapsed time in seconds since last OBC reset

AggregateParameterType.name: Vector3DType
AggregateParameterType.shortDescription: Three-component float vector (x, y, z in body frame)

IntegerParameterType.name: VersionNumberType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: CCSDS packet version number (3 bits, always 0)

IntegerParameterType.name: DataLengthType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: Packet data field length minus 1 (16 bits, bytes)

Parameter.name: APID
Parameter.shortDescription: Application Process Identifier (11 bits) — packet discriminator

Parameter.name: SeqCount
Parameter.shortDescription: Per-APID packet sequence counter (14 bits, wraps 0–16383)

Parameter.name: MET
Parameter.shortDescription: Mission elapsed time (seconds since last OBC reset)

Parameter.name: ResetCause
Parameter.shortDescription: Cause of the most recent OBC reset

Parameter.name: ResetCount
Parameter.shortDescription: Cumulative OBC reset counter since manufacture

Parameter.name: EclipseFlag
Parameter.shortDescription: Set ON when spacecraft is in Earth shadow

Parameter.name: SafeModeFlag
Parameter.shortDescription: INVALID when safe-mode interlock is active

Parameter.name: BattVoltage
Parameter.shortDescription: Battery bus voltage (polynomial-calibrated ADC to mV)

Parameter.name: BattCurrent
Parameter.shortDescription: Battery net current in mA (positive=charging, negative=load)

Parameter.name: SolarVoltage
Parameter.shortDescription: Solar array aggregate output voltage (polynomial-calibrated to mV)

Parameter.name: SolarCurrent
Parameter.shortDescription: Solar array aggregate output current (raw ADC counts)

Parameter.name: LoadPower
Parameter.shortDescription: Total spacecraft load power in watts

Parameter.name: ChargePower
Parameter.shortDescription: Net solar charging power in watts (0 during eclipse)

Parameter.name: TxPower
Parameter.shortDescription: Transmit amplifier output power in dBm (signed INT8)

Parameter.name: RxSignal
Parameter.shortDescription: Received signal strength indicator in dBm (signed INT8)

Parameter.name: FramesSent
Parameter.shortDescription: Cumulative downlink frames transmitted since last reset

Parameter.name: FramesReceived
Parameter.shortDescription: Cumulative uplink frames received since last reset

Parameter.name: FramesErrored
Parameter.shortDescription: Uplink frames with uncorrectable errors since last reset

Parameter.name: LinkState
Parameter.shortDescription: RF link acquisition and lock state

Parameter.name: SymbolRate
Parameter.shortDescription: Current modem symbol rate in baud

Parameter.name: FlashErrors
Parameter.shortDescription: Accumulated NOR flash error count since last reset

Parameter.name: EventTimestamp
Parameter.shortDescription: GPS time when the event was generated

Parameter.name: EventId
Parameter.shortDescription: Unique numeric event identifier from the event catalogue

Parameter.name: EventRepeatCount
Parameter.shortDescription: Count of identical events suppressed before this emission

Parameter.name: EventSuppressed
Parameter.shortDescription: Whether further identical events are currently rate-limited

SequenceContainer.name: CCSDSHeader
SequenceContainer.shortDescription: Abstract CCSDS Space Packet primary header (bit-packed 6 bytes)

EnumeratedArgumentType.name: SubsystemArg
EnumeratedArgumentType.shortDescription: Target subsystem for reset or configuration commands

MetaCommand.name: BaseCmd
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Abstract base — every command carries an 8-bit command ID

Argument.name: cmdId
Argument.shortDescription: Numeric command identifier from the command catalogue

MetaCommand.name: SetModeCmd
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Command the spacecraft to a new operating mode

MetaCommand.name: SetParamCmd
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Write a 32-bit value to an onboard parameter by ID

MetaCommand.name: ResetSubsystemCmd
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Assert a software reset on the specified subsystem

MetaCommand.name: ADCSPointCmd
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Command ADCS to track an inertial target (J2000 RA/Dec)

Argument.name: targetRoll
Argument.shortDescription: Desired roll angle about boresight in degrees

Parameter.name: StarCount
Parameter.shortDescription: Stars used in current solution (0 = no solution)

SequenceContainer.name: ADCSPacket
SequenceContainer.shortDescription: ADCS attitude, rate, and star tracker telemetry — APID 200

FloatParameterType.name: SciMeasurementType
FloatParameterType.LongDescription: 64-bit double-precision measurement used for calibration reference values where single-precision would lose too many significant digits.

Parameter.name: SciTimestamp
Parameter.shortDescription: GPS time at start of integration window

Parameter.name: SciChecksum
Parameter.shortDescription: 32-bit CRC of the science frame payload

Parameter.name: CalReference
Parameter.shortDescription: Reference illumination level for flat-field calibration

SequenceContainer.name: SciPacket
SequenceContainer.shortDescription: Science instrument raw data frame — APID 300
